AI.rationale: NVDA Q3 FY26 $57B (+62% YoY), Blackwell sold out, Q4 guide $65B; GOOGL first $100B quarter, Cloud +34%, capex raised to $91-93B; MSFT Azure +40%, $10B AI inference run-rate. Capex still rising, hyperscalers beating, no sign of crest.

rockets_spacecraft.rationale: RKLB Q3 record $155M (+48% YoY), 17 Electron contracts in quarter, GAAP gross margin 37%. Stock +270% TTM. Geost acquisition closed Aug. Neutron debut slipped to 2026 (Nov 11) — tactical setback, not thesis breach.

robotics.rationale: Figure 03 launched Oct 9 (5hr runtime, 90k+ part-handling pilot); Tesla Optimus targets scaled back; Boston Dynamics + TRI LBM demos Aug. Commercial humanoid revenue measured in pilots, not mass production. BOTZ top holdings industrial robots, not humanoid. Compelling thesis, real investment, pre-commercial revenue.

engineered_biology.rationale: CRSP CTX310 Phase 1 positive at AHA Nov 8 (NEJM published, mean LDL -49%, no SAEs); China lifted Illumina ban Nov 10. Catalysts emerging but ARKG holdings still pre-revenue at scale.

quantum.rationale: IBM Nighthawk 120-qubit + Loon fault-tolerant components unveiled Nov 12; quantum advantage target end-2026, FTQC by 2029. Pure-play stocks (IonQ, Rigetti, D-Wave) up 400-500% TTM on JPMorgan $1.5T initiative naming quantum. Speculative enthusiasm, no commercial quantum revenue.

nuclear_fusion.rationale: Bipartisan Fusion Advanced Manufacturing Parity Act introduced Nov 6 (45X credit extension to fusion components). Hyperscaler nuclear PPAs accelerating (Amazon-Talen 1920MW June, Meta-Constellation Clinton). NUKZ +54% TTM but driven by fission, not fusion. True fusion still pre-commercial.

general_markets.rationale: Fed cut to 3.50-3.75% in October; AGG ~7% YTD; gold $4,100-4,242 Nov on safe-haven flows and 50%+ central-bank demand growth; VIG +14.16% YTD lagging S&P 500.
